column1: C[ramtop: Non e' che voglio criticarti ma come mossa di apertura e' troppo lenta. Devi cercare di circondare il piu' possibile all'inizio, oppure rovinare la forma dell'avversario.

C[pathogenix: Do you mind if we talk about the game as we go?  Some people like to keep their cards close to their chest, but I'm easy-going :)

ramtop: I m using the iPhone during compilation breaks
C[ramtop: How long are you playing go?
C[ramtop: I started 3 yrs ago for some months, then I stopped
C[ramtop: I didn't notice R12 would put my group in atari! I think I can be happy now
pathogenix: There was a double atari at 129, that's why I said ""Gah!""
pathogenix: I misread, I though that after you cut, I could catch you in a ladder, but I didn't have enough liberties.
pathogenix: I get that wrong a lot
C[ramtop: I saw the double atari at 129 but I thought I could destroy more territor with M11 and connecting with the left group. I didn't consider R12, so I had to stop at 134
C[ramtop: At 127 I was expecting N12
pathogenix: N12 was my first thought, but I misread, I thought there was a ladder after black N12
C[ramtop: a ladder for you or for me? :)
pathogenix: For me, that's the ladder I read, but obviously it doesn't work because of the atari at N12
pathogenix: But this way black becomes thick, I think
pathogenix: That's annoying - I think I could have regained the lead in the lower-half of the board. I was too focused on the sequence down there.
ramtop: Sure. I enjoyed it. Btw what about a lunch together with francesco?
GN[possiamo giocare ancora? Ho più mega svarioni]

pathogenix: Perhaps we could do that at lunchtime?

ramtop: Lets change joseki this time
C[ramtop: Yeah interesting but very bad played by me!

column2: but I think this joseki only makes sense if white already has a stone at D10

column1: C[ramtop: I badly played 10 and 12. I should have played C4 before
C[pathogenix: I don't think 12 was bad necessarily, now white has a wall facing hoshi, I expected you to protect your cutting point so I could connect underneath
C[pathogenix: That's it - I'm turning on ""Confirm move"". I meant O11 :/

pathogenix: :D no, I've started playing all my games that way. Otherwise I tend to try things instead of reading.
C[ramtop: Ah of course disabling analisys disabled plan moves as well
C[pathogenix: I sometimes want to use planned moves for joseki, but I tend to avoid them, ever since I planned a 6 move sequence on another server and misread - I had to resign :/
